Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»SuperSport continue to frustrate with annoying ADS during Paris Olympics

Swimming fans were left tearing their hair out for the third day on Mondday as SuperSport cut to adverts, missing the results of events.

Paris Olympics 2024swimmingfans were left tearing their hair out for thethirdday running on Monday morning asSuperSportinsisted on cutting to adverts, missing the all-important final results of events.

Enjoy the Paris Olympic Games 2024 experience at your favourite ATKV Resort!

While it’s one thing to watch a race, the times posted by the swimmers is all that matters in terms of progressing to the semi-finals – or directly to the final.

For the latest Paris Olympics 2024 news, bookmarkThe South African website’sdedicated section for free-to-read content

However, immediately after the final heat of each event, SuperSport insisted on cutting to advert breaks, thus denying viewers the opportunity of seeing the overall results.

The advert breaks frequently lasted so long that viewers missed the entrants walking out for the following event, often only seeing them when on the starting blocks.

One can only hope someone has a quiet word – or reads this article – and does something about the matter!

Come on, SuperSport, you’re better than that!

For the millions of viewers who actuallyDOwant to see the results, they are urged to clickHERE– or better still, visitThe South African websitefor all the latest Paris Olympics 2024 news.

title: SuperSport continue to frustrate with ADS during Paris Olympics
author: Garrin Lambley
description: Swimming fans were left tearing their hair out for the second day on Sunday as SuperSport cut to adverts, missing the results of events.
